title: Emissive Concrete RTX
body:
Ever wanted to try one of those ray tracing shader test maps, only to be met with the disappointment, because your shader does not make concrete powder glow? Well, worry no more. This is the thing you've been missing.

Pack turns concrete powder into solid colors, and then makes it glow using LabPBR 1.3 texture format.

Requires a LabPBR 1.3 compatible shader that knows how to handle emissions.
